use_cases: Displaying success confirmations after form submissions or completed actions
Showing warning alerts for validation issues or pending deadlines
Presenting error notifications for failed operations or connectivity issues
Providing contextual help tooltips during user workflows
Delivering real-time system status updates with auto-dismissing timers
ai_summary: A toast notification system that displays temporary alert messages in four types: success, error, warning, and help. Features an auto-dismissing progress timer bar, Lucide icons, and an imperative API for programmatic control via useImperativeHandle. Includes RTL support and customizable timer colors for flexible integration across web applications.
